ddls:
CREATE TABLE "listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "monitor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the monitor that added the listing */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date and time when the listing was added */,
  "listing_price" TEXT /* Price of the listing */,
  "roi" TEXT /* Return on Investment (ROI) of the listing */,
  "deposits" TEXT /* Total deposits made to the listing */,
  "users" INTEGER /* Number of users invested in the listing */,
  "investment_type" TEXT /* Type of investment (e.g., HYIP, stocks, bonds) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the listing (e.g., active, paused, closed) */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the investment (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "min_investment" TEXT /* Minimum amount required for investment */,
  "max_investment" TEXT /* Maximum amount allowed for investment */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the listing was updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the listing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_monitor_id FOREIGN KEY ("monitor_id") REFERENCES monitors ("monitor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monitors" (
  "monitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitor */,
  "monitor_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitor */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the monitor */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the monitor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the monitor */,
  "last_check" TEXT /* Last date and time the monitor checked for new listings */,
  "check_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the monitor checks for updates (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("monitor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_registered" TEXT /* Date and time when the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investments" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the investment */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing that was invested in */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date when the investment was made */,
  "amount_invested" TEXT /* Amount invested */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the investment (e.g., active, withdrawn) */,
  "expected_return" TEXT /* Expected return on the investment */,
  "actual_return" TEXT /* Actual return on the investment */,
  "withdrawn_amount" TEXT /* Amount withdrawn from the investment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing related to the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read, unread) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role that has the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending, failed) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the generated report file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listing_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing that was updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., ROI, deposits) */,
  "update_data" TEXT /* Data updated */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the user who made the update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the update (e.g., pending, applied) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listing_updates_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)
